sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40709" key="e)pirra/picis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιρρᾰ´π-ιξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n40709.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reproof</tr_>, Ion Hist.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4019.tlg003:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
